title: valeriana cadevallii
intro: Valeriana cadevallii is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is commonly known as a type of valerian, a plant traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Valeriana cadevallii has been used to treat various health issues due to its sedative and antispasmodic properties, providing relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle cramps. Valeriana cadevallii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
